example: I have two siblings — one brother and one sister.
We visit our relatives during Tet.
We are a very close-knit family.
My family always supports my decisions.
My parents raised me to be responsible.
My grandparents belong to an older generation.
Taking care of younger siblings is a big responsibility.
A good relationship with family is very important.
There is a strong bond between me and my mother.

vietnamese: gia đình hạt nhân (bố, mẹ, con)
example: Most families in the city are nuclear families.

vietnamese: gia đình mở rộng (có cả ông bà, họ hàng)
example: In Vietnam, many people live with their extended family.
She cares for her elderly grandmother.
Family values are taught from a young age.
